untranslatable_reason: The signal requires 'open-buy volume in options >10% OTM is in top decile', which is an options-specific metric (option order flow, open interest, and moneyness). The allowed indicators do not include options data (vol_ratio_20 is equity volume only). The moneyness_threshold parameter (-0.1) and slope coefficient (-44.7 bps) reference option Greeks/levels that cannot be derived from the equity price and volume indicators available. This signal cannot be accurately translated without options-chain data.
translation_notes: Signal references deep OTM option open-buy volume (top decile threshold) as the primary entry signal. This requires real-time options order flow and open interest data stratified by moneyness levels, neither of which are available in the allowed equity-only indicator set. The holding period is 1 day (next-day returns). The statistical parameters (t=-29.6, slope=-44.7bps) confirm this is based on cross-sectional options analysis, not equity technicals.
